title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the people might be enjoying about being in nature and how it might affect their mood.

images.label: A
images.description: A solitary hiker standing on a mountain peak, looking out over a sea of clouds.

images.label: B
images.description: A family having a picnic in a sunny park with large green trees in the background.

images.label: C
images.description: A person sitting on a beach at sunset, watching the waves come in.

followUp.question: Who do you think is getting the most benefit from the experience? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say why the people might be performing in public and how they might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: A street musician playing a violin for passersby in a busy city square.

images.label: E
images.description: A troupe of actors performing an open-air theater play in a park.

images.label: F
images.description: A professional dancer performing on a grand stage with dramatic lighting.

followUp.question: Which performance do you think requires the most courage? (Why?)
